accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Seat with a clear line of sight to the speaker's face.
accommodations.source_quote: clear line of sight to the speaker's face

accommodations.text: Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.
accommodations.source_quote: scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes

accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: personal FM/DM listening system in every class

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.
accommodations.source_quote: access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed

accommodations.text: Break long assignments into smaller submitted parts.
accommodations.source_quote: break long assignments into smaller parts

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

services.provider_role: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing
services.source_quote: Deaf/hard-of-hearing itinerant support 30 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Jamal will read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Reads grade-level text at 80 words per minute.
goals.source_quote: read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy

goals.text: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities
